data.body: CI/gate evidence (operator-attested): (1) Landed via Gerrit change 836 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/836), submitted as commit 00a0c149a on main with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (0 unresolved comments). Verified +1 means _build-and-test.yml's default pytest suite — which now collects test_every_packaged_spec_passes_strict_validation — passed on the exact patchset, i.e. the eval discipline gated the vote. (2) Prompt Eval workflow run for commit 00a0c149a concluded success (gh run list --workflow='Prompt Eval' --commit=00a0c149a → status=completed conclusion=success). (3) Local pre-commit gate on the commit passed: 'lint (ruff check + format --check)' Passed and 'typecheck (mypy — full library)' Passed (shown in the commit hook output). (4) Red→green: stripping gold_set from plan-review-necessity.eval.yaml made the new test FAIL naming that spec; restoring it passed. (5) Eval suite locally: 67 passed across test_eval.py/test_eval_scorers.py/test_new_eval_specs.py/test_eval_solver.py.
